dictionary_knowledge.biological_scope: Chondrocyte transcriptomic state derived from 77-sample atlas integration
dictionary_knowledge.interpretation: Effector/metabolic chondrocyte-like state enriched for ANXA5, FOSL1, HMGA1 and redox/metabolic plasticity markers; aligned with reported effector chondrocyte terminology while retaining a metabolic qualifier.
limitations: Atlas-derived; experimental validation pending
dictionary_knowledge.naming_policy: Literature-aligned display name; stable axis_id is retained for backwards compatibility.

dictionary_knowledge.biological_scope: Chondrocyte transcriptomic state derived from 77-sample atlas integration
dictionary_knowledge.interpretation: Stromal matrix chondrocyte state marked by SCARA3, COLEC12, VCAM1, LTBP2 and CDH13; interpreted as a stromal/adhesive matrix program rather than the canonical COL1A1/S100A4 fibrocartilage program.
limitations: Atlas-derived; experimental validation pending
dictionary_knowledge.naming_policy: Literature-aligned display name; stable axis_id is retained for backwards compatibility.

dictionary_knowledge.biological_scope: Chondrocyte transcriptomic state derived from 77-sample atlas integration
dictionary_knowledge.interpretation: Matrix-maintenance chondrocyte state enriched for FMOD, COMP, OGN, CILP2 and SMOC2; this program is not assumed to be restricted to normal cartilage.
limitations: Atlas-derived; experimental validation pending
dictionary_knowledge.naming_policy: Literature-aligned display name; stable axis_id is retained for backwards compatibility.

dictionary_knowledge.biological_scope: Chondrocyte transcriptomic state derived from 77-sample atlas integration
dictionary_knowledge.interpretation: Hypoxic chondrocyte state characterized by hypoxia-adaptive markers including BNIP3, NDUFA4L2 and VEGFA.
limitations: Atlas-derived; experimental validation pending
dictionary_knowledge.naming_policy: Literature-aligned display name; stable axis_id is retained for backwards compatibility.

dictionary_knowledge.biological_scope: Chondrocyte transcriptomic state derived from 77-sample atlas integration
dictionary_knowledge.interpretation: Metabolic-stress chondrocyte state enriched for SNRPD2, MIF, GSTO1 and related stress/metabolic response markers; kept distinct from the stronger hypoxic chondrocyte axis.
limitations: Atlas-derived; experimental validation pending
dictionary_knowledge.naming_policy: Literature-aligned display name; stable axis_id is retained for backwards compatibility.

dictionary_knowledge.biological_scope: Chondrocyte transcriptomic state derived from 77-sample atlas integration
dictionary_knowledge.interpretation: Inflammatory-response chondrocyte state enriched for MMP3, ICAM1, CCL20, NOS2, PTGS2 and oxidative-stress genes such as SOD2; interpreted as an inflammation-responsive state rather than an OA-specific population.
limitations: Atlas-derived; experimental validation pending
dictionary_knowledge.naming_policy: Literature-aligned display name; stable axis_id is retained for backwards compatibility.

dictionary_knowledge.name_cn: 前肥大化基质软骨细胞
dictionary_knowledge.biological_scope: Chondrocyte transcriptomic state derived from 77-sample atlas integration
dictionary_knowledge.interpretation: Prehypertrophic matrix chondrocyte state with strong cartilage matrix maturation markers and supportive hypertrophic/mineralization-associated signals including COL10A1, IBSP and SPP1.
limitations: Atlas-derived; experimental validation pending
dictionary_knowledge.naming_policy: Literature-aligned display name; stable axis_id is retained for backwards compatibility.

dictionary_knowledge.biological_scope: Chondrocyte transcriptomic state derived from 77-sample atlas integration
dictionary_knowledge.interpretation: Fibrocartilage chondrocyte state marked by a fibro-mesenchymal remodeling program including COL1A1, COL1A2, COL14A1, MMP2, S100A4, VCAN and COL6 family genes.
limitations: Atlas-derived; experimental validation pending
dictionary_knowledge.naming_policy: Literature-aligned display name; stable axis_id is retained for backwards compatibility.

dictionary_knowledge.biological_scope: Chondrocyte transcriptomic state derived from 77-sample atlas integration
dictionary_knowledge.interpretation: Superficial zone chondrocyte state enriched for PRG4 and interface/lubrication-associated markers, with progenitor-like features interpreted conservatively.
limitations: Atlas-derived; experimental validation pending
dictionary_knowledge.naming_policy: Literature-aligned display name; stable axis_id is retained for backwards compatibility.

dictionary_knowledge.biological_scope: Chondrocyte transcriptomic state derived from 77-sample atlas integration
dictionary_knowledge.interpretation: Reparative stress chondrocyte state enriched for immediate-early and heat-shock response genes including FOS, JUNB, GADD45B, DNAJB1 and HSPA1A.
limitations: Atlas-derived; experimental validation pending
dictionary_knowledge.naming_policy: Literature-aligned display name; stable axis_id is retained for backwards compatibility.

dictionary_knowledge.biological_scope: Tissue-level cartilage identity: 弹性软骨/耳软骨
dictionary_knowledge.interpretation: EC markers support an elastic-cartilage-like state; ELN/FBLN5/LOXL1 give direct matrix evidence, while several top genes are metabolic/translation genes and should be reviewed before becoming core markers.
limitations: Tissue-level only; does not capture cell-state heterogeneity within tissue

dictionary_knowledge.biological_scope: Tissue-level cartilage identity: 透明/关节软骨
dictionary_knowledge.interpretation: HC markers strongly support a hyaline cartilage matrix programme with ACAN, COL2A1, COL9A3, CLEC3A, FRZB, CNMD and MGP.
limitations: Tissue-level only; does not capture cell-state heterogeneity within tissue

dictionary_knowledge.name_cn: 纤维软骨/半月板样软骨
dictionary_knowledge.biological_scope: Tissue-level cartilage identity: 纤维软骨/半月板样软骨
dictionary_knowledge.interpretation: FC markers support a fibrocartilage/fibromatrix-like state with FBLN1, VCAN, COL1A1/COL1A2, S100A4 and stress/remodelling genes.
limitations: Tissue-level only; does not capture cell-state heterogeneity within tissue

dictionary_knowledge.biological_scope: Functional gene module: 抗血管化抗钙化
dictionary_knowledge.interpretation: 软骨低血管化与抗钙化功能基因集。代表基因包括抗钙化 MGP 与低血管化/抗血管 CNMD (chondromodulin-1)。该词条由 PMID 文献先验与 cgrm v0.3.1 atlas 支持共同构建。
limitations: Consensus-only; atlas-specific weighting limited to AvAm axis

oa_vs_normal_hyaline.note: Inflammation axes show trend but do not pass FDR threshold

microtia_vs_normal_elastic.note: n=3 vs n=4, severely underpowered. All trends are exploratory only.

tissue_state_findings.note: Layer2 axes correctly distinguish tissue types in atlas-internal validation

robustness_caveats: ElasticCartilage_Auricular has low top-label agreement (~0.30) despite high score correlation
skipped_methods: AUCell - skipped due to Python package dependency not available
UCell - skipped due to Python package dependency not available
GSVA - skipped due to Python package dependency not available

evidence_grounding_rules.MAIN_TEXT: FDR < 0.05, Cohen's d > 0.8, positive controls pass
evidence_grounding_rules.EXPLORATORY: p < 0.05 but FDR >= 0.05, or Cohen's d < 0.5

MAIN_TEXT_READY: CartiGSFM defines a three-layer cartilage state model
Full three-layer model outperforms single-layer alternatives
ECM/MMP/ADAMTS remodeling is increased in OA
Hypoxia and Ferroptosis are decreased in OA
EXPLORATORY: OA inflammation axes show non-significant trends
PENDING_INDEPENDENT_VALIDATION: All atlas-internal findings by default require independent validation
CartiGSFM has been externally validated on independent datasets
NOT_SUPPORTED: CartiGSFM is a trained cartilage LLM
Inflammation_NFkB, IL1_Signaling, and TNF_Signaling are significantly increased in OA

dictionary_panel_qc.cell_subtype_marker_policy: Each cell_subtype core/panel marker must have its maximum atlas differential score in the same subtype; pvals_adj <= 0.05; logfoldchanges > 0; artifact genes filtered.
dictionary_panel_qc.cell_subtype_name_policy: Final literature-aligned display names were assigned while preserving stable axis_id values and old names as aliases.
